data.current_description: Delete a file in accordance with GDPR regulations.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently delete a file in accordance with GDPR regulations. This operation ensures complete removal of file data and associated metadata to meet GDPR data deletion requirements. The file will be irretrievable after deletion. Returns confirmation of successful deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about GDPR-specific implications, side effects (permanent deletion, irretrievability), and what the operation returns. Enhanced version explains the compliance context, permanence of action, and return value for better AI agent understanding.
